GET /accounts/{account_id}/scim/v2/Users.description: Lists account members as SCIM User resources. Supports optional filtering by `userName` (email) using the SCIM filter syntax (e.g. `userName eq "user@example.com"`). Pagination is controlled via `startIndex` and `count` query parameters per RFC 7644 Section 3.4.2.4.

schema.description: Account identifier tag.
schema.title: Account Identifier

schema.description: The 1-based index of the first result in the current set of list results. Values less than 1 are treated as 1.
Specifies the desired maximum number of query results per page.
SCIM filter expression (RFC 7644 Section 3.4.2.2). Only `userName eq "value"` is supported.
SCIM ListResponse envelope for User resources (RFC 7644 Section 3.4.2).

items.description: A SCIM 2.0 User resource representing an account member (RFC 7643 Section 4.1).

active.description: A Boolean value indicating the user's administrative status. Set to `false` to deprovision the user, removing their membership from the account.

displayName.description: The display name shown for the user. Falls back to formatted name or userName if not set.

emails.description: Always contains a single primary work email matching `userName`.

items.description: An email address entry for a SCIM User.

primary.description: A Boolean value indicating the preferred email address.

type.description: A label indicating the attribute's function, e.g., "work" or "home".

items.title: SCIM User Email

externalId.description: An identifier for the user as defined by the provisioning client (IdP). This value is stored and returned but not interpreted by Cloudflare.

groups.description: A list of group identifiers to which the user belongs. Includes both system group tags (prefixed `cloudflare-v1-`) and custom user group tags.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user, assigned by Cloudflare (user tag).

meta.description: Resource metadata for a SCIM User.

resourceType.description: The name of the resource type.

name.description: The components of the user's real name.

familyName.description: The family name (last name) of the user.

formatted.description: The full name, including all middle names, titles, and suffixes as appropriate, formatted for display.

givenName.description: The given name (first name) of the user.

name.title: SCIM User Name

userName.description: Unique identifier for the user, equal to the user's email address.

items.title: SCIM User

itemsPerPage.description: The number of resources returned in this page.

startIndex.description: The 1-based index of the first result in this set.

totalResults.description: The total number of results matching the query.

schema.title: SCIM User List Response

schema.description: SCIM error envelope (RFC 7644 Section 3.12). Returned on all 4XX and 5XX responses from SCIM endpoints.

detail.description: A human-readable message describing the error.
detail.example: Invalid SCIM request: userName is required

scimType.description: A SCIM detail error keyword (RFC 7644 Section 3.12). Only present for specific error conditions (e.g. `uniqueness` for duplicate member).

status.description: The HTTP status code as a string.

schema.title: SCIM Error Response

PATCH /accounts/{account_id}/scim/v2/Use.description: Partially updates a SCIM User via PATCH operations (RFC 7644 Section 3.5.2). Supports updating `userName`, `name.givenName`, `name.familyName`, and `active`. Setting `active: false` deprovisions the user (removes them from the account). For IdP compatibility, `emails[type eq "work"].value` is also accepted as an alias for `userName`.

schema.description: Account identifier tag.
schema.title: Account Identifier

schema.description: The user tag identifying a SCIM User resource (account member).
schema.title: SCIM User Identifier

schema.description: Request body for a SCIM PATCH operation on a User resource (RFC 7644 Section 3.5.2).

Operations.description: List of PATCH operations to apply.

op.description: The operation to perform. Only `replace` is currently supported; `add` and `remove` are accepted without error but have no effect. Matched case-insensitively.

path.description: Attribute path targeted by this operation. When absent, `value` must be a singular complex attribute.

value.description: The value(s) for the operation. For `replace` without a path, this should be an object of attribute name/value pairs. For member path operations, this should be an array of member value objects.

schema.title: SCIM PatchOp Request (Users)

schema.description: A SCIM 2.0 User resource representing an account member (RFC 7643 Section 4.1).

active.description: A Boolean value indicating the user's administrative status. Set to `false` to deprovision the user, removing their membership from the account.

displayName.description: The display name shown for the user. Falls back to formatted name or userName if not set.

emails.description: Always contains a single primary work email matching `userName`.

items.description: An email address entry for a SCIM User.

primary.description: A Boolean value indicating the preferred email address.

type.description: A label indicating the attribute's function, e.g., "work" or "home".

items.title: SCIM User Email

externalId.description: An identifier for the user as defined by the provisioning client (IdP). This value is stored and returned but not interpreted by Cloudflare.

groups.description: A list of group identifiers to which the user belongs. Includes both system group tags (prefixed `cloudflare-v1-`) and custom user group tags.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user, assigned by Cloudflare (user tag).

meta.description: Resource metadata for a SCIM User.

resourceType.description: The name of the resource type.

name.description: The components of the user's real name.

familyName.description: The family name (last name) of the user.

formatted.description: The full name, including all middle names, titles, and suffixes as appropriate, formatted for display.

givenName.description: The given name (first name) of the user.

name.title: SCIM User Name

userName.description: Unique identifier for the user, equal to the user's email address.

schema.title: SCIM User

schema.description: SCIM error envelope (RFC 7644 Section 3.12). Returned on all 4XX and 5XX responses from SCIM endpoints.

detail.description: A human-readable message describing the error.
detail.example: Invalid SCIM request: userName is required

scimType.description: A SCIM detail error keyword (RFC 7644 Section 3.12). Only present for specific error conditions (e.g. `uniqueness` for duplicate member).

status.description: The HTTP status code as a string.

schema.title: SCIM Error Response

POST /accounts/{account_id}/scim/v2/User.description: Provisions a new account member via SCIM. The `userName` field must be a valid email address and must match the primary email in `emails`. The account must be an Enterprise account with SCIM entitlements enabled.

schema.description: Account identifier tag.
schema.title: Account Identifier

schema.description: Request body for creating a SCIM User (POST). The `emails` field is required with a primary email matching `userName`, and `active` must be `true`.

active.description: A Boolean value indicating the user's administrative status. Must be `true` for user creation.

displayName.description: The name of the user, suitable for display to end-users. If not explicitly set, falls back to the formatted name or userName.

emails.description: Email addresses for the user. The primary email must match `userName`.

items.description: An email address entry for a SCIM User.

primary.description: A Boolean value indicating the preferred email address.

type.description: A label indicating the attribute's function, e.g., "work" or "home".

items.title: SCIM User Email

externalId.description: An identifier for the user as defined by the provisioning client (IdP). This value is stored and returned but not interpreted by Cloudflare.

name.description: The components of the user's real name.

familyName.description: The family name (last name) of the user.

formatted.description: The full name, including all middle names, titles, and suffixes as appropriate, formatted for display.

givenName.description: The given name (first name) of the user.

name.title: SCIM User Name

userName.description: Unique identifier for the user, equal to the user's email address.

PUT /accounts/{account_id}/scim/v2/Users.description: Replaces a SCIM User resource (RFC 7644 Section 3.5.1). Fully replaces the mutable attributes of the user. Supports updating `userName`, `name`, `emails`, and `active`.

schema.description: Account identifier tag.
schema.title: Account Identifier

schema.description: The user tag identifying a SCIM User resource (account member).
schema.title: SCIM User Identifier

schema.description: Request body for replacing a SCIM User (PUT). Only `schemas` and `userName` are required; other fields are optional.

active.description: A Boolean value indicating the user's administrative status. Optional; if omitted, the current value is preserved. Set to `false` to deprovision the user, removing their membership from the account.

displayName.description: The name of the user, suitable for display to end-users. If not explicitly set, falls back to the formatted name or userName.

emails.description: Email addresses for the user. If a primary email is provided, it must match `userName`.

items.description: An email address entry for a SCIM User.

primary.description: A Boolean value indicating the preferred email address.

type.description: A label indicating the attribute's function, e.g., "work" or "home".

items.title: SCIM User Email

externalId.description: An identifier for the user as defined by the provisioning client (IdP). This value is stored and returned but not interpreted by Cloudflare.

name.description: The components of the user's real name.

familyName.description: The family name (last name) of the user.

formatted.description: The full name, including all middle names, titles, and suffixes as appropriate, formatted for display.

givenName.description: The given name (first name) of the user.

name.title: SCIM User Name

userName.description: Unique identifier for the user, equal to the user's email address.

schema.title: SCIM User Replace Request

emails.description: Always contains a single primary work email matching `userName`.
